columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Last date and time recorded for the agent info

columns.name: RegistrySource
columns.description: Registry that provided the agent's metadata

columns.name: AIAgentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the agent as assigned to it in Microsoft 365 Copilot or Copilot Studio

columns.name: AIAgentName
columns.description: Display name of the agent

columns.name: AgentCreationTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent was created

columns.name: CreatorAccountUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account that created the agent

columns.name: OwnerAccountUpns
columns.description: User principal names (UPN) of all the owners of the agent

columns.name: LastModifiedByUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account that last modified that agent

columns.name: LastModifiedTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent was last modified

columns.name: LastPublishedTime
columns.description: Date and time when the agent was last published

columns.name: LastPublishedByUpn
columns.description: User principal name (UPN) of the account that last published the agent

columns.name: AgentDescription
columns.description: Description of the agent as displayed in the agent's source

columns.name: AgentStatus
columns.description: Status of the agent; possible values: Created, Published, Deleted

columns.name: UserAuthenticationType
columns.description: The agent’s configured authentication type for users interacting with the agent; possible values: None, Microsoft, Custom

columns.name: AgentUsers
columns.description: List of user principal names (UPNs) or group IDs that can use the agent

columns.name: KnowledgeDetails
columns.description: Details about the knowledge sources added to the agent

columns.name: AgentActionTriggers
columns.description: List of triggers that makes an autonomous agent take action

columns.name: RawAgentInfo
columns.description: Contents of the raw JSON that describes the agent and contains configuration details, as received from the provider

columns.name: AuthenticationTrigger
columns.description: Indicates when authentication is triggered for the agent; possible values: As Needed, Always

columns.name: AccessControlPolicy
columns.description: Users that can interact with the agent; possible values: Any, Copilot readers, Group membership, Any (multitenant)

columns.name: AuthorizedSecurityGroupIds
columns.description: List of Azure Active Directory Group IDs that are allowed to interact with the agent

columns.name: AgentTopicsDetails
columns.description: Specifications of the topics that the agent can perform

columns.name: AgentToolsDetails
columns.description: Specifications of the tools that the agent can access and perform actions on

columns.name: EnvironmentId
columns.description: The identifier of the Microsoft Power Platform environment the agent resides in

columns.name: Platform
columns.description: The platform that provided the information about the agents; possible values: Copilot Studio

columns.name: IsGenerativeOrchestrationEnabled
columns.description: Indicates whether the agent uses generative orchestration (that is, dynamically chooses tools, knowledge, and actions based on context) to operate

columns.name: AgentAppId
columns.description: The unique app identifier registered for the agent in Microsoft Entra

columns.name: ConnectedAgentsSchemaNames
columns.description: Lists the schema names of connected agents, which are independently managed agents that are linked to the main one for orchestration

columns.name: ChildAgentsSchemaNames
columns.description: Lists the schema names of the child agents that exist within the main agent

columns.name: Version
columns.description: Version of the agent

columns.name: IsBlocked
columns.description: Indicates whether the agent has been blocked by an administrator

columns.name: Instructions
columns.description: The agent's system prompt that defines its default behavior, persona, and operating boundaries

columns.name: EntraObjectId
columns.description: The agent's unique enterprise application object identifier by Microsoft Entra ID

columns.name: EntraBlueprintId
columns.description: The agent's identity blueprint principal identifier by Microsoft Entra Agent ID

columns.name: AIModel
columns.description: The AI model powering the agent

columns.name: AccessCapabilities
columns.description: Data access capabilities granted to the agent

columns.name: ElementTypes
columns.description: Technical component types that make up the agent

columns.name: SourceAgentId
columns.description: The platform-native identifier of the agent, such as the Azure Resource Manager (ARM) identifier for Microsoft Foundry agents or the environment-scoped agent identifier for Copilot Studio agents
